commonIssues:
Issues with the e-KYC process on the Delhi Parivahan portal, specifically with the Aadhaar name mismatch, preventing users from accessing DL renewal or address change services.

How to fix: Ensure your name and Date of Birth on your Aadhaar card exactly match your current DL records. If not, update your Aadhaar first at a permanent enrollment center before attempting the face-less DL services.

A high percentage of applicants fail the automated driving tests at centers like Sarai Kale Khan or Shakur Basti due to strict sensor-based monitoring.

How to fix: Practice driving on tracks that simulate the automated patterns (Reverse S, H-track, Parallel parking). Watch the official Delhi RTO videos on YouTube demonstrating how the sensors work and common fail points like touching the curb.

Confusion over the renewal timeline. Failing to renew within the one-year grace period results in having to retake the entire Learner’s and Permanent DL test again.

How to fix: Start the renewal process on the Sarathi portal up to one year before expiry. If your DL has expired for more than a year, apply for a fresh Learner's Licence first.

Delhi has faced shortages of physical smart cards, causing months of delay in receiving the DL by post.

How to fix: The digital DL in the mParivahan app and DigiLocker is 100% legally valid in Delhi for traffic police checks. Use the digital version while waiting for the physical chip-based card.
